user.title: ES Heatpump – Credentials
user.description: Enter your myheatpump.com portal credentials. The integration logs in automatically and fetches all sensor data. For EU portal accounts, pick https://eu.myheatpump.com from the dropdown.

data.power_entity: Electrical-power sensor (optional, used for COP calculation)
data.mode_source_entity: Operating-mode source entity (optional, e.g. multiscrape sensor that reads 'Heizen'/'Brauchwasser')

error.invalid_auth: Login failed — wrong username or password.
error.cannot_connect: Connection to portal failed. Check the URL (EU users: https://eu.myheatpump.com) and your network.
error.unknown: Unknown error — please check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This heat pump is already configured.

data.mode_source_entity: Operating-mode source entity (optional, e.g. multiscrape sensor that reads 'Heizen'/'Brauchwasser')
